description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx', create a dashboard that combines a Bar Chart showing 'Sales' by 'Region' and a Language Narrative visualization containing 'Region' and 'Sales'. Arrange both visualizations on the canvas and save the workbook as 'Augmented_Summary' to the Documents folder (resulting in 'Augmented_Summary.dva').
